messages.content: Hello Jarvis, open chat.
I'm opening the chat for you, Moksh. You should see the chat window now.
Open ChatGPT.
Opened https://chatgpt.com.
In ChatGPT type Hello. This is type by Jarvis.
Opened ChatGPT and typed the requested text.
Create a file called test.
Created C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Jarvis - 2026(copy)\test.
Add Hello This is written by Jarvis in test file.
Added the text to C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Jarvis - 2026(copy)\test.
Delete the test.
I'm not capable of deleting files, Moksh.
Delete test under score.
To delete test data, you can use "End Flow/Clear Flow Data" to stop running flows and clear associated data, but you'll need to manually delete saved data from folder entities separately, Moksh.
E Test under score Jarvis file from Jarvis 2026 copy.
The E Test score file from Jarvis 2026 is available on PyPI under jarvis-tools, with the latest version being 2026.3.10, Moksh.
Delete the created.
I'm not capable of deleting files, Moksh.
Delete the file you created Name test.
C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Jarvis - 2026(copy)\you created Name test does not exist.
Delete the file name named test in the folder.
C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Jarvis - 2026(copy)\name named test in the folder does not exist.
In the file test under score Jarvis add hi. This is written by Jarvis.
C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Jarvis - 2026(copy)\the file test under score Jarvis does not exist.
